# Stillwater

Stillwater is a local yoga studio with a serene, peaceful brand identity. The name evokes tranquility and mindfulness, and the desired website aesthetic — calm and airy — reflects a space where clients can find stillness and balance. The studio offers structured classes with transparent pricing and a personal touch through instructor profiles, paired with the convenience of online booking.

Source: https://stillwater-782e91c8.zappy5.app

---

## Find Your Calm at Our Wellness Center — Stillwater

URL: https://stillwater-782e91c8.zappy5.app
Description: Discover serenity at Stillwater, your local yoga studio inspired by the stillness of an evolutions fitness &amp; wellness center. Explore airy spaces and mindful practice. Begin your journey to balance today.

# Find Your Stillness Within


### A peaceful local yoga studio where balance, mindful guidance, and simple online booking make every practice welcoming — whether you're stepping onto the mat for the first time or the hundredth.


View Classes
Meet the Instructors














## Our Classes


Discover a practice that meets you where you are. From gentle introductions to deeply restorative sessions, each class is designed to nurture your body and calm your mind.






Popular

### Gentle Flow


A soothing, breath-led practice that links mindful movement with calm awareness. Perfect for unwinding tension and finding your natural rhythm.

Learn More →




New Student

### Foundations for Beginners


Build confidence from the ground up. We break down essential poses with clear guidance in a supportive, non-judgmental environment.

Learn More →




Evening

### Restorative Evening Practice


Unwind from the day with deeply supported postures held for extended periods. A tranquil practice to promote restful sleep and inner stillness.

Learn More →














## Finding Their Stillwater


Every journey begins with a single breath. Here's what our community has to say about their experience.











"I was so nervous walking into my first class, but the moment I stepped inside I felt completely at ease. The instructors are incredibly kind and made me feel welcome as a total beginner. Stillwater has truly become my sanctuary."







Sarah M.
New to Yoga












"The calm atmosphere is unlike any studio I've tried. From the soft lighting to the gentle guidance, every detail is designed to help you find stillness."







Marcus T.
Regular Practitioner










"I appreciate how transparent the class information and pricing is. The instructors are so kind and genuinely invested in your practice, no matter your level."







Elena R.
Wellness Enthusiast







Guided by personal attention and a shared love for mindful movement.














## Find Your Rhythm


At Stillwater, our weekly schedule is thoughtfully curated to support every journey—from gentle morning flows that greet the sun, to restorative evening sessions that release the day. Each class is a space to reconnect, breathe, and move at your own pace.

Explore the Full Schedule & Pricing





Monday

- 7:30 AM Morning Flow

- 12:00 PM Lunchtime Reset

- 6:00 PM Evening Unwind





Wednesday

- 7:30 AM Morning Flow

- 5:30 PM Gentle Hatha





Friday

- 9:00 AM Slow & Steady

- 4:00 PM Restorative Yoga





Saturday

- 8:00 AM Weekend Awakening

- 10:30 AM Community Practice





Online booking available through our contact page.

Whether you're ready to begin your first class, have a question about our offerings, or want to reserve your spot in an upcoming session — we're here to welcome you. Step into a space designed for calm, clarity, and connection.

## Explore Yoga Classes with Transparent Pricing — Stillwater

URL: https://stillwater-782e91c8.zappy5.app/classes-pricing
Description: Browse our structured yoga classes with clear, upfront pricing at Stillwater. From gentle flow to deep restoration, find a session that fits your path at this middle branch fitness and wellness center. Book your mat now.

Explore Yoga Classes with Transparent Pricing — Stillwater






























Skip to main content















- Home
- Classes & Pricing
- Instructors



Contact & Booking










# Find Your Stillness, Discover Your Strength


At Stillwater, we believe yoga is for every body. Our classes are thoughtfully designed to meet you where you are — whether you're stepping onto a mat for the first time or deepening a lifelong practice. With transparent pricing, small group guidance, and a serene studio environment, your wellness journey is supported from the very first breath.


Beginner-Friendly
Transparent Pricing
Small Group Guidance















## Weekly Class Schedule


Find your rhythm with our carefully curated classes. Whether you're new to yoga or deepening your practice, there's a space for you here.






### Monday


- 7:00 AM Morning Flow Beginner-friendly

- 12:00 PM Gentle Hatha Slower pace

- 6:00 PM Vinyasa Flow All levels






### Tuesday


- 9:30 AM Restorative Yoga Deep relaxation

- 5:30 PM Power Vinyasa Intermediate

- 7:15 PM Yin Yoga All levels






### Wednesday


- 6:30 AM Sunrise Meditation Beginner-friendly

- 12:00 PM Lunchtime Flow All levels

- 6:00 PM Evening Restorative Slower pace






### Thursday


- 7:00 AM Morning Flow All levels

- 4:30 PM Kids Yoga Ages 5-12

- 6:30 PM Candlelit Yin Deep stretch






### Friday


- 8:00 AM Gentle Hatha Beginner-friendly

- 12:00 PM Vinyasa Flow Intermediate

- 5:00 PM Happy Hour Yoga All levels






### Saturday


- 8:30 AM Weekend Warrior Intermediate

- 10:30 AM Prenatal Yoga All trimesters

- 4:00 PM Community Class Donation-based






### Sunday


- 9:00 AM Slow Flow All levels

- 11:00 AM Yoga Nidra Deep relaxation

- 5:00 PM Restorative Beginner-friendly















## Find Your Stillness


Transparent pricing for every journey. Whether you're dropping in for a single class or committing to a monthly practice, there's a path that fits your rhythm.








### Single Class


$
22
/ class


Perfect for the curious beginner or the traveler seeking a moment of calm. Drop into any regularly scheduled class on our weekly calendar.


- All-levels friendly

- Mat & props included

- No commitment needed


Inquire & Book





Most Popular


### 5-Class Pack


$
95
/ 5 classes


Build consistency without the pressure of a monthly contract. Classes never expire, so you can practice on your own timeline.


- Save $3 per class

- No expiration date

- Shareable with family


Inquire & Book







### Monthly Membership


$
120
/ month


For the dedicated practitioner ready to deepen their connection. Unlimited access to our full schedule of classes, workshops, and community events.


- Unlimited classes

- Priority workshop access

- 10% off retail & events


Inquire & Book
















## Practice with Intention, Grow with Ease


At Stillwater, every class is an invitation to slow down and reconnect. We've thoughtfully designed our offerings to meet you exactly where you are — whether you're stepping onto the mat for the first time or deepening a lifelong practice. Here, pacing is gentle, expectations are clear, and the atmosphere is always grounding.


As a premier evolutions fitness & wellness center, we believe that true transformation happens in a space that feels safe, supportive, and unhurried. Our instructors guide with warmth, not pressure, so you can explore movement with curiosity and confidence.












### Supportive Pacing


We honor your body's rhythm. Classes move at a mindful tempo, giving you space to breathe, adjust, and truly feel each posture without rushing.











### Clear Class Expectations


No surprises — just clarity. Every class includes a transparent overview of what to expect, from the flow style to the props you'll need, so you can arrive prepared and at ease.











### Grounding Atmosphere


Step into a sanctuary of soft light, natural textures, and quiet calm. Our studio environment is intentionally designed to help you settle into stillness from the moment you arrive.











### Options for Every Body


From gentle restorative sessions to dynamic flows, our diverse schedule welcomes new students and experienced practitioners alike. Find the class that fits your energy, your goals, and your day.

























## Ready to Find Your Stillness?



Reserve your mat or ask us about the best class to begin your journey. Whether you are curious about our gentle morning flow or ready to commit to a monthly membership, our team is here to guide you with warmth and clarity. Reach out through our contact page and we will help you choose the ideal starting point for your practice at Stillwater.



All booking requests and class questions are handled personally through our contact page. We typically respond within a few hours.


Contact for Booking











A restorative space for mindful movement, breath, and balance — welcoming every body.

## Meet the Dedicated Guides Behind Your Practice — Stillwater

URL: https://stillwater-782e91c8.zappy5.app/instructors
Description: Connect with the caring instructors who make Stillwater a true march wellness and fitness center. Each profile reflects a personal commitment to guiding your stillness. Find your teacher and deepen your practice.

Meet the Dedicated Guides Behind Your Practice — Stillwater






























Skip to main content















- Home
- Classes & Pricing
- Instructors



Contact & Booking










# Meet Your Guides


At Stillwater, our teaching philosophy is rooted in warmth, attentiveness, and personal guidance. We believe that yoga is not a one-size-fits-all practice, but a deeply individual journey. Our instructors are dedicated to creating a safe, nurturing space where every student—from first-timers to seasoned practitioners—feels seen, supported, and empowered to explore their edge with kindness.


With a focus on mindful alignment and breath-led movement, we offer more than just a class; we offer a partnership in your wellness. Our team combines decades of collective experience with a genuine passion for the transformative power of stillness, ensuring that your time on the mat translates into a more balanced life off it.



















## Meet Your Guides


Our instructors bring warmth, deep knowledge, and a genuine love for sharing the practice. Each one creates a space where you can feel safe, seen, and supported on your mat.











### Maya


Gentle Flow & Breathwork


Maya founded Stillwater with a vision of making yoga feel like coming home. Her classes weave slow, intentional movement with guided breathwork, inviting you to drop out of the mind and into the body. She believes stillness is the most advanced pose, and her calming presence makes every student feel like the only person in the room.











### Leo


Restorative & Meditation


Leo's teaching is a quiet invitation to rest deeply. With a background in mindfulness-based stress reduction, he guides students through restorative postures held long enough to unravel tension you didn't know you were carrying. His voice is steady, his pacing unhurried, and his classes often feel like a exhale the world rarely offers.











### Sari


Beginners & Foundations


Sari is the welcoming smile every new student needs. She specializes in breaking down foundational poses with clarity and kindness, making yoga accessible no matter where you're starting from. Her classes are playful, encouraging, and full of gentle adjustments that help you build confidence from the ground up.



















## Our Teaching Philosophy


At Stillwater, our practice extends beyond the mat. We believe in creating a sanctuary where mindful pacing, inclusive guidance, and intentional stillness converge to help you discover your own path to wellness.













### Mindful Pacing


We move with intention, not urgency. Every class is thoughtfully sequenced to honor the body's natural rhythm, allowing you to build strength and flexibility at a pace that feels deeply restorative rather than rushed.











### Inclusive Guidance


Yoga is for every body. Our instructors offer personalized modifications and compassionate cues that meet you exactly where you are, ensuring that every student feels seen, supported, and empowered in their practice.











### Space for Stillness


In a world that demands constant movement, we protect the pause. We integrate generous moments of meditation and breathwork into every session, cultivating a profound sense of inner quiet that you can carry beyond the studio walls.


















## Voices of Stillness


Our instructors are the heart of your practice. Here's what our community has to say about their guidance.









"I walked into Stillwater feeling completely disconnected from my body. The instructors didn't just teach poses—they taught me how to listen to myself again. Their warmth and patience turned my anxiety into curiosity. I've never felt so supported."



— Mira K.
Member since 2023










"The instructors here have a gift for making everyone feel seen. As someone who never thought yoga was 'for me,' their gentle adjustments and encouraging words built my confidence from the ground up. Stillwater is truly a sanctuary."



— David L.
Foundations Graduate







"Every class feels like a private session. The personal attention is unmatched."



— Jenna P.


















## Not Sure Where to Begin?


Every practice is personal. If you're new to yoga or simply exploring a different style, our instructors can help you find the perfect class for your experience level, goals, and energy. Reach out for a warm, no-pressure recommendation — we'll guide you toward the mat that feels like home.

Ask Which Class Fits You












A restorative space for mindful movement, breath, and balance — welcoming every body.

Contact & Booking










# Connect with Stillwater


Whether you're curious about your first class, ready to reserve your mat, or have questions about our beginner-friendly options, we're here to guide you with warmth and clarity. At Stillwater, every inquiry is met with a personal touch, because your wellness journey deserves a thoughtful start.




All class inquiries and booking requests are handled personally by our team. We look forward to hearing from you.















## Visit Stillwater


Step into our serene studio space and find your calm. We're conveniently located in the heart of the city, with easy access and a warm, welcoming atmosphere from the moment you arrive.









### Our Studio


47 Tranquil Lane

Maplewood District

Springfield, SP 90210

View on Map








### Get in Touch



















### Studio Hours


- Monday – Friday 6:30 AM – 8:30 PM

- Saturday 8:00 AM – 6:00 PM

- Sunday 9:00 AM – 4:00 PM






We recommend arriving 10–15 minutes before class begins to settle in, prepare your mat, and transition into a mindful headspace. Our doors are open to all levels — from curious beginners to seasoned practitioners.













## Get in Touch


We'd love to hear from you. Whether you're curious about classes, ready to book your first session, or have a question about our studio, send us a message. We typically respond within 24 hours, Monday through Friday.





Full Name



Email Address



Phone Number



Message





I have read and agree to the  Terms & Conditions  and  Privacy Policy


Send Message













## Find Your Stillness in the Heart of the City


Stillwater is tucked away on a quiet, tree-lined street just steps from the bustling energy of downtown. Our studio is a sanctuary where the hum of the city fades into a calming backdrop, making it easy to transition from your busy day into a space of mindful movement and breath. You'll find us nestled between the historic brick facades of Maple Avenue and the scenic walking paths of Riverfront Park.




123 Serenity Lane, Suite 2B, Downtown



Look for the warm terracotta awning next to The Daily Grind Café



A 3-minute walk from Riverfront Park and ample street parking available









📍 Stillwater Yoga Studio




















## Begin Your Stillwater Journey


Every practice starts with a single breath. Whether you're curious about your first class or ready to find your rhythm, we're here to welcome you gently. Reach out with any questions, or reserve your mat today.


Send Your Inquiry

## Privacy Policy

URL: https://stillwater-782e91c8.zappy5.app/privacy
Description: Our privacy policy - how we collect, use, and protect your information

Privacy Policy


















## Our Classes


Discover a practice that meets you where you are. From gentle introductions to deeply restorative sessions, each class is designed to nurture your body and calm your mind.







# Privacy Policy



Last Updated:  6/11/2026



Stillwater ("Company", "we", "our") is committed to protecting your privacy. This privacy policy explains how we collect, use and protect your information when you use our website [business_website] ("Service").


## 1. Information Collection


We may collect the following types of information:


- Personal Information: Name, email address, phone number and address

- Technical Information: IP address, browser type, operating system and website usage data

- Cookies: Information stored on your computer to improve user experience




## 2. Use of Information


We use the collected information for the following purposes:


- Providing requested services

- Improving service and user experience

- Contacting you regarding our services

- Compliance with legal requirements




## 3. Information Sharing


We do not sell, rent or share your personal information with third parties, except in the following cases:


- With your explicit consent

- When required by law

- To protect our rights or user safety

- With service providers who assist in operating the service (under confidentiality agreements)




## 4. User Rights


In accordance with Israeli Privacy Protection Law 1981, you have the following rights:


- Right to access personal information stored about you

- Right to correct inaccurate or incomplete information

- Right to delete personal information in certain circumstances

- Right to object to information processing for marketing purposes

- Right to file a complaint with the Data Protection Authority




## 5. Cookies


Our website uses cookies to improve user experience. You can manage cookies through your browser settings. Disabling cookies may affect website functionality.


## 6. Information Security


We implement reasonable security measures to protect your information, including encryption, firewalls and restricted access control. However, no transmission or storage method is 100% secure.


## 7. Policy Changes


We may update this privacy policy from time to time. Material changes will be posted on the website with 30 days advance notice.



## 8. Contact Information


For questions or requests regarding this privacy policy, please contact us:


- Company: Stillwater

- Email: [business_email]

- Phone: [business_phone]

- Address: [business_address]



Data Protection Authority: For complaints, you may contact the Data Protection Authority at the Ministry of Justice

## Accessibility Statement

URL: https://stillwater-782e91c8.zappy5.app/accessibility
Description: Our accessibility statement - our commitment to digital accessibility

Accessibility Statement


















## Our Classes


Discover a practice that meets you where you are. From gentle introductions to deeply restorative sessions, each class is designed to nurture your body and calm your mind.







# Accessibility Statement



Last updated:  June 11, 2026



Stillwater is committed to making our services accessible to all users. We strive to implement the Israeli Standard (TI 5568) based on WCAG 2.1 Level AA guidelines.


Accessibility Level: AA (Israeli Standard TI 5568)



## 1. Accessibility Policy


We believe in equal rights and the right of every person to receive information and services independently and equally. This website was designed and built with special emphasis on accessibility for people with disabilities.


## 2. Accessibility Arrangements on the Site


- Keyboard navigation support

- Screen reader compatibility

- Appropriate color contrast

- Flexible and scalable font sizes

- Descriptive image alt text

- Hierarchical heading structure

- Clear and descriptive links

- Support for 200% zoom without content loss





### WCAG 2.1 Compliance


The website complies with WCAG 2.1 Level AA, which includes:


- Perceivable: Information is presented in ways users can perceive

- Operable: Interface components are operable

- Understandable: Information and user interface are understandable

- Robust: Content can be interpreted by a variety of technologies





## 3. Supported Assistive Technologies


- NVDA (Windows)

- JAWS (Windows)

- VoiceOver (Mac/iOS)

- TalkBack (Android)

- Dragon NaturallySpeaking

- Switch navigation




## 4. Accessibility Testing


The website has been tested using:


- Automated accessibility testing tools

- Manual testing with screen readers

- Keyboard-only navigation

- Color contrast verification

- Testing with users with disabilities




## 5. Continuous Improvements


We are continuously working to improve the accessibility of our website and update it according to technological developments and user feedback.



## 6. Contact and Feedback


If you encounter an accessibility issue on the site or need assistance, please contact us:


- Company: Stillwater

- Email: [business_email]

- Phone: [business_phone]



Response time: We respond to accessibility inquiries within 3 business days and work to resolve issues within 10 business days.

## Terms & Conditions

URL: https://stillwater-782e91c8.zappy5.app/terms
Description: Terms of service - user rights and obligations

Terms & Conditions


















## Our Classes


Discover a practice that meets you where you are. From gentle introductions to deeply restorative sessions, each class is designed to nurture your body and calm your mind.







# Terms of Use



Last updated:  June 11, 2026



Use of this site constitutes agreement to the terms outlined below. Please read carefully before use.



## 1. Definitions


- "Company" - Stillwater

- "User" - Anyone who browses or uses the site

- "Services" - Fitness & Wellness provided through the site




## 2. Description of Services


Stillwater provides Fitness & Wellness through the site. The services are subject to the terms detailed in this document and may change from time to time.


## 3. Terms of Use


Use of the site is conditional on compliance with the following terms:


- Use of the site for lawful purposes only

- No interference with site operations or other users

- No uploading of offensive, illegal, or harmful content

- Respect for copyright and intellectual property rights

- No actions that may compromise site security




## 4. User Obligations


- Providing accurate and truthful information during registration or ordering

- Maintaining confidentiality of account access details

- Immediate notification of any unauthorized account use

- Updating personal information as needed




## 5. Payment and Refund Policy


If services include payment:


- Payments are processed through secure and encrypted systems

- Prices include applicable taxes as required by law

- Right to cancel will be in accordance with consumer protection laws

- Refunds will be processed within 14 business days of cancellation approval




## 6. Limitation of Liability


Services are provided "as is" without warranty of any kind. The Company will not be liable for indirect, consequential, or special damages arising from use of the site, except where required by law.


## 7. Copyright and Intellectual Property


All content on the site, including text, images, design, and code, is protected by copyright owned by Stillwater. Reproduction, distribution, or commercial use of content is prohibited without written permission.


## 8. Privacy


Collection and use of personal information is subject to our Privacy Policy. Use of the site constitutes agreement to the Privacy Policy as detailed separately.


## 9. Changes to Terms of Use


The Company may change these terms of use at any time. Material changes will be posted on the site with 30 days advance notice. Continued use after changes constitutes agreement to the new terms.


## 10. Service Termination


The Company may suspend or limit service at any time, including in cases of terms of use violations. In case of service termination, relevant provisions will remain in effect.


## 11. Governing Law and Dispute Resolution


These terms of use are governed by applicable laws. Any disputes will be resolved in accordance with local jurisdiction, with preference given to arbitration or mediation where possible.


## 12. General Provisions


- If any portion of the terms is found invalid, remaining terms will remain in effect

- Non-enforcement of a right will not be considered a waiver

- These terms of use constitute the entire agreement between the parties





## 13. Contact Information


For questions or clarifications regarding the terms of use:


- Company: Stillwater

- Email: [business_email]

- Phone: [business_phone]

- Address: [business_address]
